hooks.prompt: Before finishing: (1) Were all tasks completed? (2) Were tests run after code changes? (3) Was TASKS.md updated? (4) Are there uncommitted changes that should be committed? Reply {"ok": true} or {"ok": false, "reason": "what was missed"}.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .command 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"rm -rf /"*|*"--force"*|*"--no-verify"*|*"push --force"*|*"reset --hard"*) echo "BLOCKED: dangerous command detected" >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac'
